svg.title: System architecture diagram
svg.desc: Three-layer architecture: client-side Vue app, Express.js server with strategies and services, and external payment APIs
svg.text: Client — Vite + Vue 3 + Pinia + Tailwind + Socket.IO

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the ChatWindow component')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the MessageBubble component')

sendPrompt('Tell me more about the order.ts Pinia store')
sendPrompt('How does the Socket.IO client service work?')
